settings.description: Privacy-first outbound campaign analysis for AI workspaces.

tools.name: refresh_data
tools.description: Refresh the local SendLens cache from the configured source provider.

tools.name: load_campaign_data
tools.description: Load one selected campaign for copy, ICP, reply, or next-test diagnosis.

tools.name: prepare_campaign_analysis
tools.description: Hydrate enough one-campaign reply evidence for working/not-working analysis.

tools.name: fetch_reply_text
tools.description: Fetch exact inbound reply bodies for one selected campaign.

tools.name: workspace_snapshot
tools.description: Return the first high-level read of the active local workspace.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List public SendLens tables and views for schema orientation.

tools.name: list_columns
tools.description: List columns and DuckDB types for one public SendLens table or view.

tools.name: search_catalog
tools.description: Search public SendLens table and column names by concept.

tools.name: analysis_starters
tools.description: Return curated SQL recipes and exactness notes for common analysis paths.

tools.name: setup_doctor
tools.description: Run a safe in-process setup doctor without shell commands or secret output.

tools.name: seed_demo_workspace
tools.description: Seed and activate a synthetic demo workspace without provider credentials.

tools.name: refresh_status
tools.description: Check the local SendLens refresh lifecycle and cache freshness state.

tools.name: analyze_data
tools.description: Run focused read-only DuckDB SELECT/WITH analysis against the active local workspace.

skills.title: SendLens Setup
skills.description: First-run setup, doctor checks, host bundle verification, cache readiness, and zero-key demo seeding.

skills.title: SendLens Analyst
skills.description: Workspace diagnosis, campaign triage, reply, ICP, copy, deliverability analysis, and broad orchestration.

skills.title: SendLens Campaign Strategist
skills.description: Focused campaign audience, exclusions, offer, angle, sequence architecture, and experiment strategy.

skills.title: SendLens Copywriter
skills.description: Evidence-backed subjects, bodies, CTAs, sequences, rewrites, variants, and claim ledgers.

skills.title: SendLens Launch Operator
skills.description: Launch, scale, resume, stop, measurement, readiness, learning, and client handoff workflows.
